title: Tour package meta.json
description: Schema for content-system/tours/<slug>/meta.json. Validated by platform/qa-rules.php.

brand.description: Active brand used in all public copy.

channel_product_codes.description: Channel-specific IDs keyed by channel name (e.g., viator, tripadvisor).

secondary_product_codes.description: Deprecated alias for channel_product_codes; keep for backward compatibility.

variant_of.description: Base package slug when this package is a content variant of an existing tour. Set per the multi-variant rule in AGENTS.md.

variant_index.description: Position of this variant in the per-tour cluster. The base package is implicitly index 1; the first explicit variant is 2.

variant_angle.description: Short human label describing how this variant differs from siblings (e.g., 'BOFU day-trip / five-villages keyword variant').

variant_role.description: Cluster slot this variant fills. Two packages with the same variant_of must not share variant_role unless explicitly approved by the user.

inherited_warnings.description: Variant inheritance handshake log. One entry per warning inherited from the base package, with the user's decision.

warnings.description: Non-blocking process warnings (e.g., placeholder website link, missing accessibility, unresolved cancellation unit). Distinct from conversion_blockers, which is reserved for true blockers (e.g., zero booking URLs of any channel).

attribution.description: Optional attribution/UTM templates per channel. Reserved for future per-cluster relinking automation.

canonical_title_status.description: confirmed only after user clarifies when the source title is truncated/conflicted.

tour_title.description: Deprecated. Use canonical_tour_title (stable identifier) and page_title (SEO/H1 title). Do not set in new packages.

pricing.description: Per-band pricing keyed by band name (adult, child, infant, etc.)

cancellation_window_hours.description: Cancellation window in hours. Null when the source-supplied unit is unresolved (raw value preserved in cancellation_window_raw and a clarification is open).

hero_image.description: Relative path to hero image, e.g. images/hero.jpg, or absolute URL.

public_copy_state.description: Tracks whether the public-facing blog-post.md is a holding notice (hard clarify gate active), a provisionally-approved draft, or final ready-for-review copy.

intake_questions_resolved.description: True when the upfront WPS:CLARIFY intake questions have been answered by the user (or explicitly waived via provisional mode).

clarification_questions_presented.description: True when blocking clarification questions were explicitly presented to the user in chat or AskUserQuestion.

clarification_questions_presented_at.description: Date clarification questions were presented to the user.

clarification_mode_selected.description: Clarify-gate path selected for this generation run. Use `auto_resolved` when all detected ambiguities were handled by the non-blocking auto-resolution rules in AGENTS.md without prompting the user.

clarification_questions.description: Audit log of clarification questions actually presented to the user in this run.

can_generate_public_copy.description: Computed generation gate: true only when no blocking clarifications remain OR provisional mode is explicitly authorized.

clarifications_needed.description: Open WPS:CLARIFY items written by the generator and resolved by the user.
